title: playtime tracker
description: track your world playtime displayed in days, hours, minutes, and seconds!
body:
## playtime tracker
[![github](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/available/github_vector.svg)](https://github.com/plex1on/playtime-tracker)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/playtimetracker)

track your world playtime displayed in days, hours, minutes, and seconds!

**by default, playtime is displayed above your hotbar:**
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hiwqofoo/images/7c26f12d78ef627c7a1ddbeb6a87c1f5a0474a67.png)

**..but this can be toggled via:** *(playtime will still be tracked in the background)*
```
/trigger playtime_display
```

---

**alternatively, display global playtime with:**
```
/scoreboard objectives setdisplay sidebar playtime_s/m/h/d
```

| name | scoreboard |
|----- | ---------- |
| seconds | `playtime_s` |
| minutes | `playtime_m` |
| hours | `playtime_h` |
| days | `playtime_d` |
